mechanism: Portfolio construction models (ALM, risk parity, mean-variance) embed 1998-2021 negative correlations with 3-5 year mandate review cycles. Transition to positive correlation increases 60/40 portfolio risk by ~50% before models adjust.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as institutional mandate review cycles lag the correlation regime change. Diminishes as mandates update. Strongest in the first 3-5 years of regime transition.
